title: Emerald Coins
description: This pack changes the emerald texture to look more like a coin, maintaining the vanilla look
body:
This texture pack transforms the emerald item into a coin-like shape while maintaining its classic vanilla look. It makes trading with villagers or friends feel more immersive.

![The coins used for trading](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdff799ffee66156074e88f7d5804c2f54f9ac53.png)
